scripts.check: bun packages/standards-cli/src/cli.ts structure --profile source && bun packages/standards-cli/src/cli.ts dependabot --check && bun packages/standards-cli/src/cli.ts github --check && turbo run lint check-types test
scripts.check:fix: bun packages/standards-cli/src/cli.ts structure --profile source && bun packages/standards-cli/src/cli.ts dependabot --write && bun packages/standards-cli/src/cli.ts github --check && turbo run lint:fix check-types test
